results.name: koh
results.description: Make sure to show no emotion as you read this tag's page—even the slightest expression is enough for Koh to steal your face.

results.name: koilos
results.description: A desertic, mountainous region of New Argive, Dominaria.

results.description: A desertic, mountainous region of Terisiare, Dominaria.

results.name: koni kim
results.description: Richard Garfield's second wife, married in 2015.

results.name: kor
results.description: A race of people with white/grey skin, typically from Dominaria/Rath or Zendikar.

results.name: kothophed
results.description: One of the four demons who made a pact with Liliana, now deceased.

results.name: kozilek
results.description: One of the three Eldrazi Titans, a reality warper.

results.name: krarks other thumb effect
results.description: If you'd roll a die, instead roll that many plus extra, then pick/get the best results.
